idea: Create a SaaS platform for freelance project management and team collaboration
description: A web and mobile platform designed specifically for freelance teams and agencies. The platform provides real-time project tracking, client communication, time tracking, invoicing, and payment integration. It targets the growing freelance economy with features like portfolio showcasing, automated invoicing, and integrations with popular tools like Slack and GitHub. Revenue model includes tiered subscription (Starter at $29/mo, Pro at $79/mo, Enterprise custom) with target of 5% market share in the freelance PM space within 3 years.
